## [2026-03-31] - Auto-Generated Update

```markdown
### Features

*   **AI Video Script Generation**: Introducing a new pipeline that allows users to upload videos and receive three distinct AI-generated scripts (Funny, Aesthetic, Educational) with precise timestamped voiceovers. This feature is secured with Supabase for user authentication and video storage.
*   **Automated Changelogs**: Enhanced project transparency and update consistency by implementing an AI-powered system for automatic changelog generation.
```
